title: senecio colensoi
intro: Senecio colensoi, also known as Groundsel or Colenso's Ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio colensoi include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Senecio colensoi can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
